events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: Sir Richard Starkey, known as Ringo Starr, the legendary drummer for The Beatles, was born on this day in 1940.

angles.name: Drum Legend
angles.copy: Happy 86th Birthday to the one and only Ringo Starr! What's your favourite Beatles track featuring his iconic drumming?

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's iconic guitarist, songwriter, and astrophysicist, Sir Brian Harold May, celebrates his 79th birthday today.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the legendary Brian May! From stadium anthems to his incredible guitar solos, what's your favourite Queen moment?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: Sir Michael Philip Jagger, the electrifying frontman of The Rolling Stones, was born on this day in 1943.

angles.name: Rock Icon
angles.copy: Still rocking stages worldwide! Wishing a very happy 83rd birthday to the incomparable Mick Jagger. What's your go-to Rolling Stones track?

events.title: MTV launched (1981)
events.blurb: On this day in 1981, MTV officially launched in the United States, revolutionising music and television with its 24-hour music video format, famously kicking off with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star'.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: 45 years ago, MTV changed the game. What was the first music video that truly blew your mind and made you realise the power of the visual?

events.title: Oasis released 'Definitely Maybe' (1994)
events.blurb: Oasis's seminal debut album, 'Definitely Maybe', was released on August 29, 1994, propelling the Mancunian band to superstardom and becoming a cornerstone of Britpop.

angles.name: Britpop Classic
angles.copy: Remember when Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe'? That album defined a generation. What's your favourite track from their explosive debut?

events.title: Woodstock Festival began (1969)
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, billed as 'An Aquarian Exposition: 3 Days of Peace & Music', kicked off on this day in 1969 in Bethel, New York.

angles.name: Peace & Music
angles.copy: 57 years ago, Woodstock brought together half a million people for three days of peace and music. Which iconic performance do you wish you'd seen live?

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's passing (1977)
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of the death of Elvis Presley, the 'King of Rock and Roll', who passed away in 1977.

angles.name: King's Legacy
angles.copy: Remembering the King today. Elvis Presley's influence on music is immeasurable. What's your all-time favourite Elvis hit?

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur shooting (1996)
events.blurb: On this day in 1996, influential rapper Tupac Shakur was shot in a drive-by shooting in Las Vegas; he sadly passed away six days later.

angles.name: Tupac's Impact
angles.copy: Remembering the profound impact of Tupac Shakur, who was tragically shot on this day in 1996. His music continues to resonate.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's passing (1970)
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of the death of Jimi Hendrix, widely regarded as one of the greatest guitarists in music history, who passed away in 1970.

angles.name: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: Remembering the unparalleled genius of Jimi Hendrix, who left us on this day in 1970. His guitar mastery remains unmatched.

events.title: The Beatles released 'Abbey Road' (1969)
events.blurb: The Beatles' iconic 'Abbey Road' album, featuring that unforgettable zebra crossing cover, was released in the UK on September 26, 1969.

angles.name: Iconic Album
angles.copy: That album cover, those songs! The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' was released on this day in 1969. What's your favourite track from this masterpiece?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: Chrissie Hynde, the formidable frontwoman of The Pretenders, celebrates her 75th birthday today.

angles.name: Pretenders Icon
angles.copy: Happy 75th Birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! A true rock icon, what's your favourite Pretenders track?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Liam Gallagher, the distinctive voice of Oasis and a Britpop legend, celebrates his 54th birthday today.

angles.name: Mad For It
angles.copy: Happy 54th Birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! What's your favourite tune featuring that unmistakable voice?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' released (1971)
events.blurb: John Lennon's timeless anthem 'Imagine' was released as a single in the US on October 11, 1971, inspiring generations with its message of peace.

angles.name: Timeless Anthem
angles.copy: 55 years since John Lennon released 'Imagine'. Its message is as powerful today as it was then. What does this iconic song mean to you?

events.title: Apple released the first iPod (2001)
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the original iPod on October 23, 2001, revolutionising how we carry and listen to music, famously promising '1,000 songs in your pocket'.

angles.name: Pocket Full of Tunes
angles.copy: Remember the first iPod? It changed everything for music lovers. How many songs did you cram onto yours?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: Today is James Bond Day, celebrating the premiere of the first 007 film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Who's your favourite Bond, and what's the ultimate 007 theme song? Licence to thrill!

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: John Winston Ono Lennon, the visionary co-founder of The Beatles and a powerful solo artist, was born on this day in 1940.

angles.name: Lennon's Legacy
angles.copy: Remembering the incredible John Lennon, who would have been 86 today. His music and message of peace continue to inspire.
